name: pnp-list-formatting-course-training-tiles
title: Course Training Tile Cards
shortDescription: Modern tile card layout for displaying training courses with images, badges, and hover previews in SharePoint Gallery view.
longDescription: Modern tile card layout for displaying training courses with images, badges, and hover previews in SharePoint Gallery view. Features 280×350px tile cards with course thumbnails, hover popup showing title and description, duration badge that auto-converts to hours/minutes, flag badge for highlighting courses, responsive images with fallback to default, and direct links to course content.

references.name: Use view formatting to customize SharePoint
references.description: You can use view formatting to customize how items in SharePoint lists and libraries are displayed.
